g.text: epicd — runtime deployment (supervisor · driver-per-pipeline · workers · spawn seam)
the engine (driver) decides *when / which* task to run;
the actual Agent-in-worktree spawn is done by the thin harness
The seam abstracts `invokeClaudeCode(taskPrompt, worktree)`: ideal impl = `claude -p "<self-contained prompt>"`
(one headless process/task); today's impl = one persistent interactive
the adapter is prompt-agnostic transport. swap-litmus: engine output must drive EITHER a Monitor seat OR raw `claude -p`.
channels DERIVED from (pipeline, phase, actor); `.agent-done` sentinel ⇒
engine.complete() → adjudicate DoD (ENG-8) → merge under lock (ENG-3)
